title: Element Reference Mapping
concept: Assigning temporary ID tags (like 'e1', 'e2') to interactive elements so the agent can target them precisely.

exercises.prompt: What do we use ARIA trees for?

options.text: To give a structured list of interactive elements

exercises.explain: ARIA trees help us organize and understand interactive elements on a page.

cards.title: Element Reference Mapping
cards.body: In this lesson, we’ll learn how to give temporary ID tags to elements so our AI agent can interact with them better.

cards.title: What is Element Reference Mapping?
cards.body: Element Reference Mapping is the process of assigning temporary IDs, like 'e1' or 'e2', to elements for precise targeting by an AI.

cards.title: Mapping Like a Filing System
cards.body: Think of Element Reference Mapping like labeling folders in a filing cabinet. Each folder (element) gets a unique tag so you can find it easily.

cards.title: How It Works
cards.body: For instance, if we have a button, we can assign it 'e1'. This lets the AI know exactly which button we're referring to.

cards.title: Myth: Tags Don’t Matter
cards.body: Some think that tags are not important. In reality, they help the AI to find and interact with the right elements quickly.

exercises.prompt: What does assigning a tag like 'e1' help the AI do?
exercises.explain: Assigning a tag like 'e1' helps the AI easily locate and interact with specific elements on the page.

exercises.prompt: True or False: Element Reference Mapping assigns unique IDs for better AI targeting.
exercises.explain: True! Element Reference Mapping helps assign unique IDs to elements, allowing for precision in targeting.

exercises.prompt: Assigning temporary ID tags helps the AI ___ specific elements.
exercises.sentence: Assigning temporary ID tags helps the AI target specific elements.
exercises.explain: The correct completion is 'target', as this highlights the main purpose of tagging elements.

exercises.prompt: Which statement about Element Reference Mapping is true?

options.text: Tags can be used for any type of data.
Each element gets a unique temporary ID for clear identification.
Tags are not important for AI agents.

exercises.explain: The correct statement is that each element gets a unique temporary ID, which is vital for clear identification and interaction.

exercises.prompt: Why is Element Reference Mapping important for AI agents?

options.text: It helps AI to target specific elements accurately.
It makes elements harder to find.
It replaces the need for ARIA trees.

exercises.explain: Element Reference Mapping is crucial because it allows AI agents to target specific elements with precision, enhancing their interaction and functionality.
